description: Parses the user query to extract function parameters and generates the appropriate function call JSON structure

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.description: The raw user query containing the request for a function call with specific parameters

inputs.name: functions
inputs.description: Available function definitions in JSON format that define the callable functions and their parameters

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and parameters as a nested object. For the circumference example: {"calculate_circumference": {"radius": 4, "unit": "inches"}}. The structure varies based on which function is called and what parameters are extracted from the query.

fields.function_name: dict - Contains the parameters for the identified function call

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user query and generates appropriate JSON function call with extracted parameters
